shopping_api_schema.json: Magento 2 REST API: products, categories, catalog inventory & stock, cart/quote management, checkout, orders, invoices, shipments, transactions, credit memos, sales rules & coupons, customers, authentication tokens, CMS pages & blocks, tax, store/website/group config, multi-source inventory, product reviews, gift messages, search, directory, EAV attribute sets, PayPal/Braintree auth, Adobe Stock assets, analytics
gitlab_api_schema.json: GitLab REST API: projects, repositories, branches, tags, commits, repository files, submodules, remote mirrors, merge requests, merge request approvals, merge trains, issues, issue links, CI/CD pipelines, pipeline schedules, pipeline triggers, jobs, job artifacts, runners, groups, subgroups, group milestones, group labels, group iterations, group boards, group wikis, group variables, group badges, group protected environments, users, personal access tokens, SSH keys, GPG keys, access requests, members, invitations, deploy keys, deploy tokens, protected branches, protected tags, protected environments, epics, epic issues, epic links, linked epics, labels, milestones, iterations, boards, notes, discussions, award emoji, events, notifications, snippets, wikis, packages, container registry, feature flags, environments, deployments, resource groups, freeze periods, error tracking, alert management, vulnerabilities, vulnerability exports, vulnerability findings, managed licenses, dependencies, integrations, webhooks, system hooks, audit events, search, namespaces, topics, cluster agents, Geo nodes, SAML, SCIM, instance CI variables, settings, plan limits, sidekiq metrics, usage data, statistics, analytics, bulk imports, import/export, secure files, badges, project templates, status checks, suggestions, markdown, lint, todos, broadcast messages, appearances, applications, features, experiments
